disagreements.chief_strategist_resolution: Use most conservative CIO manual review posture when agents disagree.
Preserve deterministic operator blocks and escalate risk items to CIO review.

cio_attention_items: V3 agent council degraded: Qwen/Ollama did not produce validated reports for the latest cycle.

agents.agent_role: Check freshness, archive mismatch, source reliability, stale sections, and dataset usability.
agents.summary: Dataset raw is truncated and incomplete; source health shows 3 active sources but expected 52 sources. Critical path: BEA_GDP_PCE source is active but has low trust (0.97) and last seen 2026-06-15T08:28:06. Missing 2 sources from expected 52, indicating incomplete dataset.
key_findings: [DATASET] Dataset raw is truncated and incomplete
risk_flags: P3: Incomplete dataset with missing sources
blind_spots: Source health data is truncated and incomplete

agents.agent_role: Interpret macro regime, cross-market stress, sector breadth, and high-beta permission.
agents.summary: Macro regime is MILD RISK OFF with score -1. Fear index at 37.3 (FEAR). Treasury yields: 10Y 4.49%, 2Y 4.2%, 30Y 4.93%. Cross-market confirmation active with 57 tickers. Risk appetite contracting. High-beta risk not permitted. Current posture invalid if risk appetite expands or macro conditions shift to growth positive.
risk_flags: P3: Current posture invalid if risk appetite expands or macro conditions shift to growth positive

agents.agent_role: Interpret catalyst calendar, live news brief, ECE themes, portfolio catalysts, and urgent events.
agents.summary: Catalyst Intelligence Agent identified FDX Earnings Release as the most urgent catalyst for CIO attention. The catalyst is confirmed (is_confirmed:1) and has 3 days until event. It is not in portfolio (in_portfolio:0) but has a working order (has_working_order:0).
key_findings: [DATASET] FDX Earnings Release on 2026-06-23 (3 days until)
risk_flags: P1: FDX Earnings Release imminent catalyst

agents.agent_role: Evaluate configured sector posture and identify sector-level risk or opportunity.
agents.summary: Sector posture analysis shows NVDA options flow indicates risk-on sentiment in MAG7/BIG TECH sector with 95% confidence. No clean catalyst identified for sector rotation. Sector requires CIO verification due to operator blocks.
key_findings: [DATASET] NVDA options flow shows 95% confidence risk-on sentiment in MAG7/BIG TECH sector
risk_flags: P1: Unusual large options trades on NVDA indicate potential market stress
